notes: Country-level VIZA RAG seed for thailand. This file is the source of truth for this country's visitor/tourism visa knowledge and is designed to evolve alongside the country-specific form-filling workflow.

chunks.title: 中国护照泰国短期旅游签证建议
chunks.content: 中国护照持有人赴泰国短期旅游时，VIZA AI 应优先核查泰国外交部/使领馆当前 visa exemption、visa on arrival 或 tourist visa 规则。泰国规则近年调整频繁，回答时要说明需以出发前泰国官方页面为准，并确认停留天数、入境次数、是否有返程/续程票和是否需要长期停留。

chunks.title: Thailand visa exemption overview
chunks.content: Royal Thai Embassy guidance for the visa exemption scheme states that ordinary passport holders of eligible countries/territories can enter for tourism without a visa for a period not exceeding 60 days, subject to current official lists and entry checks. Travellers may be asked for proof of adequate funds, confirmed onward travel, accommodation, and passport validity. If the user's nationality is not eligible, recommend Thai e-Visa or a tourist visa route.

chunks.title: When Thailand tourist visa may be needed
chunks.content: If a traveller wants to stay beyond the visa-exempt period, enter repeatedly, work remotely under a specific long-stay route, or is not eligible for exemption, VIZA AI should not assume visa-free entry. Route them to the official Thai e-Visa / Royal Thai Embassy guidance for tourist visa or other visa categories.

documents.title: Thailand TDAC Arrival Card Form Requirements

chunks.title: Thailand application channel and form scope
chunks.content: Use the standalone TH_TDAC_ARRIVAL_CARD package for Thailand Digital Arrival Card preparation. Official source URLs reviewed for this seed: https://tdac.immigration.go.th/manual/en/index.html ; https://tdac.immigration.go.th/manual/en/faq.html. TDAC is not a Thai tourist visa or Thai e-Visa and must stay separate from visa-exemption or e-Visa workflows. Route work, study, residence, immigration, journalism or other regulated purposes to a separate country workflow.

chunks.title: Thailand fields to collect before filling the form
chunks.content: Thailand TDAC intake should collect personal details, passport details, nationality, occupation, contact details, travel purpose, arrival/departure dates, mode of travel, flight/vehicle/vessel details, country or region boarded, port of arrival, accommodation/address in Thailand, health declaration details, and official declaration acknowledgements. Do not silently reuse Thai e-Visa fields for TDAC.

chunks.title: Thailand supporting documents and review checklist
chunks.content: TDAC preparation evidence should focus on passport details, travel itinerary, arrival/departure dates, transport details, Thai accommodation/address, and health declaration information. Workflow guardrails: VIZA should keep TDAC separate from Thai tourist visa and e-Visa workflows and avoid promising entry because immigration checks still apply.
